title: Conditional for polite requests
subtitle: Sound softer with podría and querría.
overview: The conditional makes requests less direct.
Podría is one of the most useful polite forms.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I would like to change the reservation.
I would like to reserve a table.

items.en: I would like a quiet room.

items.es: ¿Me podría mandar la información por email?
items.en: Could you send me the information by email?

items.es: Me gustaría hablar con la recepción.
items.en: I would like to speak with reception.
Could I change the appointment to Friday?
